text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While working hard to change herself, Zenno Rob
Roy learns that Air Groove has high hopes for her
close friend, Sweep Tosho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, Sweep Tosho and I head to her
grandma's house.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho explains that when people tell her
what to do, she feels like they don't believe in
her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hearing this, her grandmother offers me some
advice, saying that I should consider myself more
of a supporting presence than a guiding one.
